'''Brosins''' were [[Near-Human]]s from [[Brosi]].<ref name="air" />

==History==
Brosins shared their native planet with [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Old Republic]] settlers for centuries.<ref name="air" /> After the discovery of [[Zinsian]] veins on the planet, the [[Corporate Sector Authority/Legends|Corporate Sector Authority]] government began displacing thousands of Brosins and "hiring" the youngest ones to work in their dangerous Zinsian processing plants. This led to the creation of the [[Brosin Underground]], to fight the CSA in an attempt to remove them from Brosi.<ref name="air" />

{{Species-stub}}
